title: lagerstroemia pustulata
intro: Lagerstroemia pustulata, also known as the Crape Myrtle or Red Flowered Crape Myrtle, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Lagerstroemia pustulata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as applied topically in the form of creams and ointments.
